hero.badge: A new era in subscription control
hero.subtitle: Detect price hikes, expiring deals, and services no longer worth it. All in one place.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can I use Killer Control for free?
faq.a1:
Yes. The free plan is designed so you can verify the tool's real value without risking anything. With it, you can connect and manage up to 5 active subscriptions, receive basic alerts when a fee changes price, and see a monthly summary of your digital service spending.

It is not an artificially limited trial plan: it is a functional tier designed for users with few subscriptions who want control without complications. If you ever need more capacity, scale to Premium with a single click without losing any of your data or previous settings.
faq.q2: What does the Premium plan include?
faq.a2:
Premium unlocks the full potential of Killer Control. Key differences from the free plan:
  • • Unlimited subscriptions — Connect all your services without a ceiling: streaming, software, gyms, paid newsletters, domains, cloud storage, and any recurring fee.
  • • Real-time smart alerts — We notify you the exact moment a platform raises prices, launches a cheaper plan, or changes conditions.
  • • Complete price history — Visualize the evolution of each fee month by month and detect patterns of hidden hikes.
  • • Personalized savings recommendations — Our AI engine analyzes your real usage profile and suggests cheaper alternatives or bundles that reduce your total spend.
  • • Data export — Download your subscription report in CSV or PDF for accounting, tax returns, or simply to have everything documented.
faq.a3:
Absolutely, with no fine print. Killer Control has no lock-in periods, cancellation penalties, or minimum commitment times on any of its plans.

If you cancel Premium, your account isn't deactivated immediately: you will continue enjoying all Premium features until the last day of the period you've already paid for. Upon finishing that cycle, your account will automatically switch to the free plan, keeping all your data, history, and settings intact.
You can reactivate Premium at any time if you change your mind, and everything will be exactly where you left it. Cancellation takes less than 30 seconds from your account panel, with no forms or calls to customer service.
faq.q4: Do I need a card to get started?
faq.a4:
No. To sign up and use the free plan we do not ask for any payment details. No credit card, bank account, or PayPal. Just your email.

We believe you should be able to verify if Killer Control is useful to you before committing any financial data. That's why sign-up is completely free and frictionless.
We will only ask for a payment method when you decide to upgrade to Premium voluntarily. At that point, we accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and PayPal, with transactions encrypted via Stripe.
faq.a5:
Behind every recommendation is an analysis system structured in three layers:
  1. Tracking over 500 platforms — The system collects and periodically updates prices and plans available in major digital services globally: streaming, SaaS tools, storage, security, online education, and more.
  2. Comparison personalized to your profile — Your current fees are cross-referenced with available alternatives considering your usage frequency, potential overlaps between services (e.g., two platforms offering the same thing), and discounts for bundles or annual plans you might be missing.
  3. Prioritization engine — Internal algorithms rank opportunities according to their real economic impact ($/year saved), ease of switching, and risk of losing important features. This ensures recommendations are clear, practical, and result-oriented.

The result appears on your dashboard as a prioritized list of concrete actions, with the estimated annual savings for each.
